summary: The user sought assistance in organizing their travel schedule for the upcoming quarter, mentioning their recent participation in the TechXpo at the Las Vegas Convention Center from February 10-12, where they launched a new wireless charging pad. They decided to use Google Calendar to manage their events and planned to create separate calendars for work and personal life.
facts: The user attended the TechXpo at the Las Vegas Convention Center from February 10-12, where they launched a new wireless charging pad. The user plans to use Google Calendar to manage their schedule and has decided to create separate calendars for work and personal life. The user intends to schedule follow-up meetings with potential clients they met at the TechXpo. The user will title their follow-up meeting with ABC Inc. as "Follow-up meeting with ABC Inc." and set the location as a conference call. The user plans to add a brief description of the meeting and set a reminder for the day before to ensure they are prepared.
